title: salix subdentosa
intro: Salix subdentosa, also known as the Korean willow, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Salix subdentosa include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Salix subdentosa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
